scope: SDAR 설계문서 검증 — PART2 §6.9 vs VAMOS_SDAR_DESIGN_SPECIFICATION.md

mismatches.detail: PART2 L2829 uses simplified state names (IDLE, DETECTING, etc.) while SDAR_SPEC §7.1 uses SDAR_S0_MONITORING through SDAR_S6_DONE (7 states). PART2 lists ESCALATED as a state, but SDAR_SPEC shows SDAR_S6_DONE as the final state with escalation as a transition path, not a named state. PART2 notes this discrepancy in XREF-S6-05 comment: 'ESCALATED는 독립 상태가 아니라... 종료 상태. 편의상 7상태로 표기'. This is an acknowledged simplification.

match_details.part2_ref: PART2 implied in L2865 (LOW risk at AR-L2)

match_details.fact: Emergency Kill Switch: 모든 RBAC 역할 활성화 가능, ADMIN 이상 해제
자동 Kill Switch ON 조건: SDAR_ROLLBACK_FAILED
CATEGORY E 보안 오류 5가지 특별 규칙 (자동수리 금지, 즉시 차단, 감사 로그 강제, 인간 알림, 데이터 30일 보존)
match_details.detail: All 5 CATEGORY E rules match exactly

match_details.fact: P2 도메인 수리 제한: AR-Level 무관 인간 승인, Circuit Breaker 자동 복구 금지, P2 자동 생성 금지
비용 영향 제한: CostBudget 상한 내, 일일 10% 초과 시 승인, switch_model CostGate 재검증

missing.sot_fact: AR-Level과 Autonomy Level 매핑: L0→AR-L0, L1→AR-L2, L2→AR-L3, L3→AR-L4
missing.detail: PART2 §6.9 does not include the AR-Level to Autonomy Level mapping table

missing.sot_fact: RBAC와 AR-Level: OWNER=L0~L4, ADMIN=L0~L3, OPERATOR=L0~L2, VIEWER=조회만
missing.detail: PART2 §6.9 does not include the RBAC-AR Level permission matrix
PART2 §6.9 does not enumerate the 13 SDAR-specific failure codes
PART2 §6.9 does not list the 4 SDAR fallback strategies

missing.sot_fact: V1→V2 전환 조건: LOW 성공률≥95%, 오탐<5%, Kill Switch 0회
missing.detail: PART2 does not include SDAR-specific version transition conditions

missing.sot_fact: Monorepo 구조 확장: backend/vamos_core/sdar/ 디렉토리 구조
missing.detail: PART2 §6.9 does not include the detailed sdar/ directory structure from SDAR_SPEC §6.5

check_details.sot_fact: SDAR 모듈 ID: I-25, status=COND, V1=OFF, V2=COND, V3=ON
check_details.detail: PART2 references I-25 correctly with COND status throughout
PART2 §6.9 5-Gate integration references I-19, I-8 connection. Full integration table partially covered
PART2 L2849-2855 lists all 5 SDAR gates correctly

check_details.sot_fact: Gate 코드 공유: Gate 1/3/4가 VAMOS 5-Gate와 BaseGate(ABC) 공유
check_details.detail: PART2 L2857 explicitly describes BaseGate(ABC) → check(context) → GateResult pattern

check_details.sot_fact: 수리 액션: LOW 5개(RA_001~005), MEDIUM 5개(RA_006~010), HIGH 4개(RA_011~014), NEVER 10개
check_details.detail: PART2 L2861-2868 matches action catalog: NONE=0, MINIMAL=2, LOW=5, MEDIUM=5, HIGH=4, NEVER=10

check_details.sot_fact: 오류 분류 5 카테고리: A=Infra(12), B=Model(8), C=Logic(6), D=Code(6), E=Security(6)
check_details.detail: PART2 does not enumerate specific error codes per category but references SDAR_SPEC for details

check_details.sot_fact: Self-evo 원칙: 수리 결과 자동 적용 절대 금지, Layer 3 = 제안
AR-Level과 Autonomy Level 매핑: L0→AR-L0, L1→AR-L2, L2→AR-L3, L3→AR-L4
check_details.detail: PART2 §6.9 does not include the AR-Level to Autonomy Level mapping table

check_details.sot_fact: RBAC와 AR-Level: OWNER=L0~L4, ADMIN=L0~L3, OPERATOR=L0~L2, VIEWER=조회만
check_details.detail: PART2 §6.9 does not include the RBAC-AR Level permission matrix
PART2 mentions kill_switch events but does not list all 26 SDAR events
PART2 §6.9 does not enumerate the 13 SDAR-specific failure codes
PART2 §6.9 does not list the 4 SDAR fallback strategies

check_details.sot_fact: V1→V2 전환 조건: LOW 성공률≥95%, 오탐<5%, Kill Switch 0회
check_details.detail: PART2 does not include SDAR-specific version transition conditions

check_details.sot_fact: Circuit Breaker 양방향 통합: CB→SDAR (OPEN시 signal), SDAR→CB (수리후 HALF-OPEN)
check_details.detail: PART2 mentions Circuit Breaker in P2 context but doesn't detail the bidirectional integration

check_details.sot_fact: Monorepo 구조 확장: backend/vamos_core/sdar/ 디렉토리 구조
check_details.detail: PART2 §6.9 does not include the detailed sdar/ directory structure from SDAR_SPEC §6.5

findings.description: SDAR State Machine 상태명 차이: PART2는 간소화된 이름(IDLE, DETECTING 등)을 사용하고, SDAR_SPEC은 정식 이름(SDAR_S0_MONITORING 등)을 사용. PART2가 XREF 주석으로 인지하고 있는 차이.
findings.evidence: PART2 L2832: 'IDLE → DETECTING → ...' vs SDAR_SPEC §7.1: 'SDAR_S0_MONITORING → SDAR_S1_DETECTED → ...'

findings.description: SDAR Layer 1 Channel B/C 세부 감지 규칙(빈도 임계값, 이상탐지 baseline)이 PART2에 누락됨.
findings.evidence: SDAR_SPEC §2.2: Channel B 빈도(5분내 3회), 연쇄(60초), Channel C 응답시간 200%, QoD<0.5 3회 등

findings.description: SDAR AR-Level ↔ Autonomy Level 매핑 및 RBAC-AR 권한 매트릭스가 PART2에 누락됨.
findings.evidence: SDAR_SPEC §3.2: L0→AR-L0, L1→AR-L2(기본값), L2→AR-L3, L3→AR-L4. §3.4: OWNER=AR-L4까지, ADMIN=AR-L3까지

findings.description: SDAR Failure Code 13개 및 Fallback 4개가 PART2 §6.9에 열거되지 않음. 구현 시 SDAR_SPEC 직접 참조 필요.
SDAR sdar/ 디렉토리 구조(detection/, diagnosis/, prescription/, repair/, verification/)가 PART2에 누락됨.
findings.evidence: SDAR_SPEC §6.5 defines full sdar/ subdirectory with 6 subpackages and specific file names
